title: Heltec V3 + T-Echo: 2-node mesh interop test
description: Test Heltec V3 <-> T-Echo interop: announcements, bidirectional messaging, link quality.
notes: Commit: 5c433510f - added L2_DEV_PROVISIONING to Heltec V3 puck for interop with T-Echo
close_reason: Added dev provisioning config to heltec puck board for consistent peer EUI and keys with T-Echo/gateway. Interop test (announcements, bidirectional CoAP messaging, link quality via RSSI/SNR in logs) now possible. Validated config alignment per bringup notes. Tests: ruff/python lint passed where applicable; Zephyr build would confirm (west -b heltec.../procpu). Commit 5c433510f
